title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, published on PyPI as ‘ollama’.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (PyPI: langchain-ollama) to use Ollama models in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (Docker-ready) with chat history, model management, and multi-user support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive TUI for Ollama written in Go, offering model picker and chat history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and PVC model cache.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama (Maven Central) with async, streaming, and embeddings APIs.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation example using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration (PyPI: ollama-haystack) providing generator and embedding components.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node to call Ollama models inside automation workflows.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for offline LLM tests.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama (NuGet: OllamaSharp) with async streaming and chat completions.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command to query local models privately.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts on selected notes and insert results inline.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate (ollama-rs) providing async wrappers for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir library (Hex: ollama) for chatting and embedding with Ollama in OTP apps.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package (pub.dev: ollama) for using local LLMs in mobile/desktop apps.
